label: Voxel game systems design
notes: Inclusive production design for harvest / craft / build — what each system does and how it connects.

pillars.name: Gather loop
pillars.summary: Operations yield materials into the bag. Tools (hand, pick, axe, shovel, rod) map to node types.

pillars.name: Craft loop
pillars.summary: Stations consume bag mats and emit tools, kits, consumables. Recipes are content SSOT under content/harvest.

pillars.name: Build loop
pillars.summary: Place / wall / floor / ramp / door / station ops snap kits onto the voxel grid. Demolish refunds with skill.

pillars.name: Mine-Loader Codex
pillars.summary: Blocks (~250) and mechanics definitions are SSOT from Mine-Loader /api/blocks and /api/definitions. Item catalog is browse reference until inventory binds.

pillars.name: Maps & assets library
pillars.summary: Arenas, dungeon GLBs, forge scenes, voxel templates, and live Realms island. Promote path: Open voxel → interchange → Mine-Loader scene.

pillars.name: Seed worlds & portal dungeons
pillars.summary: Minecraft-like deployments: one seed regenerates the open overworld. Dungeons are only reached by finding portals in that seed world (not free teleport menus in production).

pillars.name: Skill trees
pillars.summary: Harvest, crafting, building, survival, explorer trees unlock ops depth and craft tiers. Local until /api/professions.

pillars.name: Explorer & avatars
pillars.summary: Fleet characters plus user-made cube heads from Avatar Edit / LED Mask import onto Explorer for harvest play.

pillars.name: Mode UX
pillars.summary: Q cycles combat ↔ harvest ↔ build. Hold Tab radial picks ops. P opens this production shell. X dodge, C parry stay combat-safe.
